title: three-flatland Normal Source Descriptor
description: Region-aware control document for the normal-map baker (`bakeNormalMap` in packages/normals). The authoritative shape is the hand-authored `NormalSourceDescriptor` TypeScript interface at packages/normals/src/descriptor.ts — this schema conforms to that type, not the other way around, so the baker's runtime types never depend on this package. Consumed by the library API (`bakeNormalMap(pixels, w, h, descriptor)`), the CLI (`flatland-bake normal --descriptor <file>`), and the loader API (`LDtkLoader.load(url, { normals: descriptor })`). All fields at the descriptor root are defaults inherited by every region unless a region overrides them.

version.description: Reserved for future schema evolution. Currently always 1.

bump.description: Default bump source for regions that don't specify one. Default 'alpha'.

direction.description: Default tilt for regions that don't specify one. Default 'flat'.

pitch.description: Default tilt pitch in radians. Default Math.PI / 4.

strength.description: Default gradient strength. Negative values invert the bump. Default 1.

elevation.description: Default elevation for regions that don't specify one. Default 0 (ground).

regions.description: Regions of the source texture. When omitted, the whole texture is treated as a single region inheriting all descriptor defaults.

NormalBump.description: Per-texel bump source inside a region.

NormalDirection.description: Screen-relative direction the surface normal's XY component points. Cardinal/compass aliases (e.g. 'up'/'north') are equivalent. Numbers are radians in standard math convention (0 = +X / right, CCW positive).

Elevation.description: World-space elevation in [0, 1], where 0 = ground plane (floor) and 1 = top-of-wall (cap). Baked into the normal atlas's B channel.

bump.description: Per-texel bump source. Default inherits from descriptor ('alpha').

direction.description: Base tilt direction. Default inherits from descriptor ('flat').

pitch.description: Tilt angle in radians from flat. Ignored when direction === 'flat'. Default inherits from descriptor, which defaults to Math.PI / 4.

strength.description: Gradient strength multiplier for this region. Default 1.

elevation.description: Default inherits from the descriptor, which defaults to 0.
